name: wb-bubble-frames

expect.error: countries must be array of 2-30 ISO-3 codes
countries must be array of 2-30 ISO-3 codes
xIndicator must be a World Bank code or alias

_note: Builds animated Gapminder bubble frames (x/y/size indicators per year) for 2-30 countries. Fuzz_cases land on PRE-NETWORK validation: count range, the fail-CLOSED numeric guard on startYear/endYear (poisoned -> ok:false invalid <field>, never a clamped ok:true), and the indicator-code format guard (XSS blocked before URL interpolation). NEVER no_db (no DB).
